Tailored to You — How It Works

  • Place your order today — there is no need to wait or decide measurements now.
  • Add your measurements as special instructions on the cart page, if you wish.
  • After your order, our couture advisor personally contacts you to confirm an accurate, flattering fit.

Your gown is then cut, draped and hand-embroidered to you alone, and delivered in 20–25 days.

View the measurement guide →
or order online
✦Each piece is cut, draped and hand-embroidered to order by our karigars — never machine-made.
✦Complimentary worldwide delivery by DHL Express, beautifully packaged.
✦A personal advisor accompanies every order, confirming your measurements and fit after you order.
Every Karishma & Ashita piece is made to measure. After your order, our atelier cuts and constructs the garment to your individual measurements, then hand-embroiders the corset over several weeks before a final press and quality check. Your piece reaches you in 20–25 working days.
  • Modal satin drape with a richly hand-embroidered structured corset
  • Natural-fibre base fabrics — breathable, fluid and soothing to wear
  • Hand embroidery in pearl, crystal and thread by master karigars
  • Concealed boning and structure for a sculpted, confident silhouette
All measurements in inches. For a true couture fit, select Made to my measurements and share your details with your style advisor.

  • Crafted to order in 20–25 working days

  • Dry clean only — store flat, away from direct light

The Designers' Note

“We wanted the structure of a corset and the soul of a saree to meet — something a woman could wear to be looked at, and feel entirely herself.”

Karishma & Ashita
Founders & Creative Directors
The Hand of the Maker
180+Hours of Hand Embroidery

No machine touches a Karishma & Ashita corset. Each motif is placed by a single karigar, bead by bead, thread by thread — a discipline measured not in minutes, but in patience. What you wear is the quiet record of a craftsman’s hands.

Made for You Alone

The Couture Journey

From the first conversation to the final fitting, your piece is created around you — and you alone.

I

The Consultation

Begin with a private appointment — in our Mumbai atelier or virtually from anywhere in the world. We listen, we sketch, we advise.

II

Made to Your Measure

Your garment is cut and hand-embroidered to your exact measurements, with any personalisation worked into the design.

III

The Final Fitting

Hand-finished, pressed and quality-checked, then delivered to your door worldwide by DHL Express — ready for your moment.

Styling Notes

One House,
Every Celebration

This corset and drape was made to move through a wedding season. Worn long and fluid for a reception, it is pure drama. Styled with heirloom jewels for a sangeet, it becomes a memory. Our style advisors will tailor the silhouette, length and embroidery to your role in the celebration.

Whether you are the bride, her sister, her mother, or the guest everyone remembers — there is a way to wear it that is entirely yours.

The Bride Sister of the Bride Mother of the Bride Reception Cocktail Sangeet Engagement Festive
